high.label: high
high.message: This major is a strong match for your profile.

medium.label: medium
medium.message: This major is a moderate match and worth exploring further.

low.label: low
low.message: This major is currently a weaker match compared to other options.

Cong nghe thong tin.description: Focuses on software development, systems, networks, and problem solving.

Khoa hoc du lieu.description: Combines statistics, machine learning, and data analysis for decision making.
suggestions: Practice Python, SQL, and data visualization.
Work on small data analysis portfolios.

Quan tri kinh doanh.description: Covers management, operations, leadership, and business strategy.
suggestions: Take part in business case competitions.
Study fundamentals of finance and marketing.

Marketing.description: Centers on branding, market research, creative campaigns, and customer engagement.
suggestions: Learn digital marketing tools and analytics.
Build sample campaigns for real products.

Thiet ke do hoa.description: Focuses on visual communication, design principles, and creative software tools.
suggestions: Master tools like Figma or Adobe suite.

Dieu duong.description: Prepares students for patient care, clinical support, and healthcare teamwork.
suggestions: Strengthen biology and health science knowledge.

Ngon ngu Anh.description: Builds advanced English communication, translation, and intercultural competence.

Luat.description: Develops legal reasoning, argumentation, and understanding of regulations.
suggestions: Improve critical reading and argument skills.
Follow legal case studies and debates.
Practice structured writing and evidence use.

Su pham.description: Trains future educators in teaching methods, communication, and learner support.
suggestions: Practice public speaking and lesson planning.

He thong thong tin quan ly.description: Bridges business operations with information systems and process optimization.
suggestions: Learn both business fundamentals and IT basics.

Ke toan tai chinh.description: Focuses on accounting, auditing, financial reporting, and business analysis.
suggestions: Strengthen numerical accuracy and attention to detail.
Study basic taxation and reporting standards.

Du lich va lu hanh.description: Prepares for tourism operations, travel planning, and customer service.
suggestions: Gain practical experience in events or tours.

Bao chi va truyen thong.description: Covers journalism, media production, interviewing, and storytelling.

Kien truc.description: Combines design creativity with technical planning for buildings and spaces.
suggestions: Build skills in CAD and modeling tools.
Study materials, structure, and sustainability basics.

Ky thuat co khi.description: Focuses on machinery, manufacturing, automation, and mechanical systems.

feature_rules.reason: Strong analytical profile aligns with tech/data majors.
Business interest and communication/leadership support management major.
Creative profile is highly relevant to design-oriented majors.
Healthcare interest with biology preference matches nursing pathway.
Language orientation aligns with English major requirements.
Entrepreneurship goals align with business and marketing skills.
